backstory.original: Wherever the aasimar known as Turiel goes, devils and demons know to tread lightly. Acting on orders of his divine patron, Bahamut, Turiel works tirelessly to bring law, order, and justice to Toril. When not busy with inquisitions or crusades, Turiel calls the endless libraries of Candlekeep his home, studying ancient tomes and seeking guidance for his next holy mission.
backstory.display: 这位被称为图里尔的神裔所到之处，魔鬼和恶魔都会小心谨慎。根据他的神圣守护者巴哈姆特的命令，图里尔不知疲倦地工作，将法律、秩序和正义带到托瑞尔。在不忙于审讯或远征的时候，图里尔会将烛堡无尽的图书馆当作自己的家，研究古老的书籍，为他的下一个神圣使命寻求指导。

description.original: Turiel points at a random enemy and flame-like radiance strikes them from above.
description.display: 图里尔指向一名随机敌人，如火焰般的光辉打击从天而降。

description.original: Turiel pushes back enemies and slowly increases party damage for 30 seconds as long as no one in the party is attacked.
description.display: 图里尔将敌人击退。并且如果队伍中无人受到攻击，他将在 30 秒内逐步提高队伍的伤害。

longDescription.original: Turiel removes his mask and becomes enveloped in a pillar of light. All enemies are pushed back and the party's damage slowly increases over 30 seconds. If a Champion gets attacked, this buff is reduced. The ultimate will end early if the party gets hit by too many attacks. During this time Turiel is immobile and doesn't attack.
longDescription.display: 图里尔摘下面具，然后被光柱所包围。所有敌人都被击退，队伍的伤害在 30 秒内缓慢提高。如果勇士遭到攻击，此增益将会减弱。当队伍遭到过多攻击时，杀招将会提前结束。在这时，图里尔将无法移动，而且也不会发动攻击。

description.desc: Turiel increases the damage of all Champions by 100% for each column they are behind him, stacking multiplicatively.
图里尔身后的每列勇士均使所有勇士的伤害提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Turiel buffs Champions in the columns behind him, based on how far back they are.
tipText.display: 图里尔为他身后纵队中的勇士提供增益，具体取决于他们之间的距离。

description.desc: When an enemy attempts to attack Turiel, they instead attack a different valid target, if one is available. When this occurs, Turiel increases the effect of Embodiment of the Law by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively up to 30 times and resetting stacks when changing areas.
当一名敌人尝试攻击图里尔时，会转为攻击另外一个有效目标（如有）。此情况发生时，图里尔使“秩序象征”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最高可堆叠 30 层，并在改变区域时重置层数。

description.pre: Fiends are Turiel's Favored Foe. After attacking a fiend-type enemy, Embodiment of the Law is increased by $amount%. When Order's Demand redirects the attack of a fiend-type enemy, its effect is increased by $amount% as well. Both effects last until you change areas.
炼狱生物是图里尔的偏好对手。攻击一名炼狱生物类型的敌人后，“秩序象征”的效果提高 $amount%。当“秩序之令”改变一名炼狱生物类型敌人的攻击对象时，其效果提高 $amount%。两种效果均持续到改变区域为止。

tipText.original: Turiel hates fiends with a fiery passion and buffs the formation even more when fighting fiends.
tipText.display: 图里尔对炼狱生物的恨意熊熊燃烧，在与炼狱生物战斗时进一步强化阵型。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Embodiment of the Law by $(amount)% for each Lawful Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一名守序勇士，“秩序象征”的效果提高 $(amount)%

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

description.desc: All Champions deal bonus damage based on their individual CON scores (+$(not_buffed amount)% per point of CON above $optional_min_stat, stacking multiplicatively).
所有勇士依据其各自的体质点数造成额外伤害（多于 $optional_min_stat 点体质的每点体质 +$(not_buffed amount)% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠）。

specializationDescription.original: Turiel increases the damage of Champions based on their Constitution.
specializationDescription.display: 图里尔依据勇士的体质提高他们的伤害。

description.desc: All Champions deal bonus damage based on their individual CHA scores (+$(not_buffed amount)% per point of CHA above $optional_min_stat, stacking multiplicatively).
所有勇士依据其各自的魅力点数造成额外伤害（多于 $optional_min_stat 点魅力的每点体质 +$(not_buffed amount)% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠）。

specializationDescription.original: Turiel increases the damage of Champions based on their Charisma.
specializationDescription.display: 图里尔依据勇士的魅力提高他们的伤害。

description.desc: Turiel has a keen eye for deception; $amount% of non-boss enemies that spawn are actually duplicitous Rakshasa, fiend enemies who have shape-shifted into other forms. These enemies count as fiends (in addition to their original enemy type) for the purpose of Favored Foe mechanics and Turiel's Unflinching Hatred.
图里尔善于洞悉伪装；刷新的 $amount% 非首领敌人其实都是狡诈的罗刹--可转变成其他形态的炼狱生物敌人。这些敌人均被视为炼狱生物（除其原本的敌人类型之外），适用于偏好对手机制及图里尔的“坚定仇恨”。

description.original: You never know when YOU will be the needy one.
description.display: 你也不知道什么时候，你会成为那个需要帮助的人。

description.original: It's not luck, it's... oh you wouldn't understand just follow me.
description.display: 这不是运气，这是......算了你不会懂的，跟着我就行。

description.original: Follow me and you'll do the Platinum Dragon proud.
description.display: 跟着我，你就会成为白金巨龙的骄傲。
巴哈姆特的意志将会得到贯彻。

description.original: Do you have a moment to talk about the Platinum Dragon?
description.display: 有时间听我讲讲白金巨龙吗？

description.original: I am but an illusion. A leaf on the wind.
description.display: 我只是一个幻觉。像风中的一片树叶。

description.original: To know your enemy, you must understand your enemy.
description.display: 若要了解敌人，就必须理解敌人。

description.original: You can pick them out in the crowd if you pay attention.
description.display: 如果注意观察，你可以在人群中找出它们。

effects.description: Additively increases the effect of Turiel's March of the Rakshasa ability by 10%
Additively increases the effect of Turiel's March of the Rakshasa ability by 30%

description.original: I speak out against the Queen of Dragons!

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Turiel's specialization choices by $amount%.

description.original: How many of us are here? Perhaps a few can wait outside?
description.display: 我们这里有多少人？也许有几个可以在外面等着？

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Turiel's specialization choices by $amount%.

description.original: The time for debate is over!

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Turiel's specialization choices by $amount%.

description.original: Strength of Bahamut, flow through me!
description.display: 巴哈姆特之力流遍我全身！

description.original: Good may be corrupted, but law is ineffable by definition.
description.display: 善良可能会被腐化，但律法本质上是不可言喻的。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Wherever the aasimar known as Turiel goes, devils and demons know to tread lightly. Acting on orders of his divine patron, Bahamut, Turiel works tirelessly to bring law, order, and justice to Toril. When not busy with inquisitions or crusades, Turiel calls the endless libraries of Candlekeep his home, studying ancient tomes and seeking guidance for his next holy mission.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Turiel supports from the front of the formation, buffing all those behind him and deflecting the attention of those who would attack him. Works best in Lawful and high CON formations.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 这位被称为图里尔的神裔所到之处，魔鬼和恶魔都会小心谨慎。根据他的神圣守护者巴哈姆特的命令，图里尔不知疲倦地工作，将法律、秩序和正义带到托瑞尔。在不忙于审讯或远征的时候，图里尔会将烛堡无尽的图书馆当作自己的家，研究古老的书籍，为他的下一个神圣使命寻求指导。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 图里尔能从阵型前排提供辅助，为他身后的所有人提供增益，并且转移攻击他的敌人的注意力。在守序和高体质阵型中能发挥最大作用。
